calendar.matters:
MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-28-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Tad Mailander, Esq., for failure to obtain Default Judgment is ordered off calendar/Default on file. Proceedings reported by: Brenda Fields. (212).

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Sep-28-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Vicki Gross.
Tad Milander, Esq. for Plaintiff: Western Financial Communications.
Order waiving live testimony of witness in file.
After hearing the evidence presented and declaration in support, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Equitex, Inc. as follows:
Damages $247,700.00
Attorney's Fees $6,350.00
Costs $224.50 for a total of $254,274.50
Judgment signed in open court.

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-13-2004 Continued To Oct-28-04 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Philip T. Kilduff, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff. Order to Show Cause to Tad Mailander, Esq., for failure to obtain Default Judgment is heard this day. Court ordered the OSC continued to 10/28/2004 at 10:30 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Diana Padilla. (212)

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-03-2004 Continued To Jul-08-04 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Tad Mailander, Esq., for failure to obtain answer or enter default, or obtain Judgment of file a dismissal is ordered continued to 7/8/2004 at 10:30 AM in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Susan Lee. (212)
